revision.text:
[[ja:赤留比売命神社]] {{Expand Japanese|赤留比売命神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine | native_name = 赤留比売命神社 | image = Akahirume jinja.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.622546|135.558672}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine'''|赤留比売命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Keidai-sha|lt=Keidai-sha|qid=Q135009973|1=Keidai-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Supershrine|lt=Shikinai Supershrine|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 9 ** P155: {{ill|Todorokihimenomikoto Shrine|lt=Todorokihimenomikoto Shrine|ja|止止呂支比売命神社|qid=Q11545333|1=Todoroki-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11545333|ltq=Q11545333|qid=Q11545333|1=Todoroki-hime-no-Mikoto Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Ame-no-Mikumari-toyoura Shrine|lt=Ame-no-Mikumari-toyoura Shrine|qid=Q135098895|1=Ame-no-Mikumari-toyoura Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q861256|ltq=Q861256|qid=Q861256|1=Hirano-ku, Osaka}} * {{ill|Settsu Province|lt=Settsu Province|ca|Província de Settsu|cs|Provincie Seccu|de|Provinz Settsu|en|Settsu Province|eo|Provinco Seccu|es|Provincia de Settsu|fa|ولایت ستسو|fr|Province de Settsu|gl|Provincia de Settsu|hak|Settsu-koet|id|Provinsi Settsu|it|Settsu (provincia)|ja|摂津国|ko|셋쓰국|lt|Seccu žemė|nl|Settsu (provincie)|pt|Província de Settsu|ru|Сэтцу (провинция)|simple|Settsu Province|sk|Seccu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Сецу|tr|Settsu (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Сеццу|zh_min_nan|Settu-kok|zh_yue|攝津國|zh|攝津國|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}} * {{ill|Sumiyoshi district|lt=Sumiyoshi district|ja|住吉郡|zh|住吉郡|qid=Q10885872|1=Sumiyoshi district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.622546|135.558672}} == image (P18) == * Akahirume jinja.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181030 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} * 181029 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == country (P17) == * Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine former site|lt=Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine former site|qid=Q135185705|1=Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine former site}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府大阪市平野区平野東2-11', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:赤留比売命神社]] {{wikidata link|Q117848511}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name= Akahirume-no-Mikoto Shrine |Image= [[File:Akahirume jinja.jpg|250px]] |Location= {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Osaka City|Q35765|qid=Q35765|1=Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Hirano Ward|Q861256|qid=Q861256|1=Hirano-ku, Osaka}}{{ill|lt=Hirano-higashi|Q88982379|qid=Q88982379|1=Hirano-higashi}} 2-11 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Akahirume-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |Sacred object= |Shrine rank= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki-listed shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} (a {{ill|lt=Kanpei-sha|Q11452104|qid=Q11452104|1=kokuheisha}} under the ritsuryō system) |Established= Unknown |Main hall= |Alternate name= Sanjūbu Shrine |Pilgrimage designation= |Annual festival= Akahirume-no-Mikoto Shrine Summer Festival |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Osaka city|label=Akahirume-no-Mikoto
Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Akahirume-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (あかるひめのみことじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Hirano-higashi|Q88982379|qid=Q88982379|1=Hirano-higashi}}, {{ill|lt=Hirano Ward|Q861256|qid=Q861256|1=Hirano-ku, Osaka}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka City|Q35765|qid=Q35765|1=Osaka}}. It enshrines {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Akahirume-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} as its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=principal deity|1=UNKNOWN}}. Because it is an {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}-listed {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} (a {{ill|lt=Kanpei-sha|Q11452104|qid=Q11452104|1=kokuheisha}} under the ritsuryō system), it is believed to have already existed by the mid-{{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}{{Cite web|Japanese book|title=26. Akahirume-no-Mikoto Shrine |url=https://www.city.osaka.lg.jp/kensetsu/page/0000009222.html |website=Osaka City |access-date=2023-04-22 |language=ja}}{{Cite web|Japanese book|title=Akahirume-no-Mikoto Shrine (Sanjūbu Shrine) |url=https://www.city.osaka.lg.jp/hirano/page/0000210304.html |website=Osaka City |access-date=2023-04-22 |language=ja}}. === History === In the medieval period, it was called “Sanjūbu Shrine” (三十歩神社). There are various theories regarding the origin of the name Sanjūbu Shrine. One theory holds that during the {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|qid=Q1193078|1=Ōei}} era of the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|qid=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, there was a {{ill|lt=drought|Q43059|qid=Q43059|1=Drought}}, and when {{ill|lt=rainmaking|Q477738|qid=Q477738|1=Rainmaking (ritual)}} rituals were performed, thirty copies of the {{ill|lt=Lotus Sutra|Q861212|qid=Q861212|1=Lotus Sutra}} were chanted, resulting in divine efficacy. Another theory states that the shrine grounds at the time measured thirty steps in size. Today, it is a {{ill|lt=subsidiary shrine|Q1071160|qid=Q1071160|lt=末社|1=Setsumatsusha}} of {{ill|lt=Kumata Shrine|Q11523763|qid=Q11523763|1=Kumata Shrine}}, but it was formerly a subsidiary shrine of {{ill|lt=Sumiyoshi Taisha|Q705949|qid=Q705949|1=Sumiyoshi-taisha}}{{Cite web|Japanese book|title=Album of Heisei 25 |url=https://kumata.jp/h25album |website=Kumata Shrine |date=2016-07-28 |access-date=2023-04-22 |language=ja |last=Shrine Office}}. === Precincts === * {{ill|lt=Main hall|Q2044994|qid=Q2044994|1=Honden}} – A vermilion-painted {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=ikken-sha nagare-zukuri|1=UNKNOWN}} structure. At the entrance to the precincts is a {{ill|lt=temizu basin|Q2972160|qid=Q2972160|1=Chōzubachi}} dedicated in {{ill|lt=1698|Q7706|qid=Q7706|1=1698}} ({{ill|lt=Genroku|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} 11), inscribed with “Sanjūbu Daimyōjin.” * Sumiyoshi Shrine * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inari Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} – Yoshioka Inari Shrine. * Kotohira Shrine – Relocated in {{ill|lt=1897|Q7847|qid=Q7847|1=1897}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 30) from a nearby shrine. * {{ill|lt=Tenmangū|Q798838|qid=Q798838|1=Tenmangū}} – Similar to Kotohira Shrine. === See also === * {{ill|lt=Kumata Shrine|Q11523763|qid=Q11523763|1=Kumata Shrine}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Akahirume-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|lt=Hirano Ward|Q861256|qid=Q861256|1=Hirano-ku, Osaka}} === References === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Akaruhimenomikoto Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinai Supershrine]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Hirano-ku, Osaka]] [[Category:平野区の歴史]] [[Category:平野 (大阪市)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka]]
